description: Create the linkpenting.html page with password protection, interactive accordion UI, quick-nav buttons at top, and all source content from the converted PDF. Then add navigation links to it in index.html, header.html (mobile menu), and footer.html. This is for nasabah dan tim Project Cuan (not agents).
steps: Create /public/pages/linkpenting.html following the exact pattern from /public/pages/agen-tools.html for structure, styling, and password authentication. Password must be 'petrusjakub'. Use sessionStorage key 'pc_linkpenting_auth' (different from agen-tools).

Add a hero section with title 'Link Penting' and description indicating this page is 'Perpustakaan Digital BMI Manulife - Khusus untuk Nasabah dan Tim Project Cuan'. Use breadcrumb: Beranda > Link Penting.
Add auth gate (.auth-box) identical to agen-tools.html pattern with password 'petrusjakub'.

Inside #protectedContent, add quick-nav buttons at the top - pill/badge buttons that anchor to each main section (I. Simple Produk Knowledge with all products listed). Style as .btn--outline or similar pill shapes.

Create accordion sections for Section I: Simple Produk Knowledge containing ALL 14 products from the source file. Each product gets its own accordion card with clickable header that expands/collapses. Inside each accordion, list all sub-items (A, B, C, etc.) as clickable links extracted from the source file. The 14 products are: 1. MIUHC, 2. MDLA, 3. MPS Flexi, 4. MPPS, 5. MCCP, 6. MDWA, 7. MSP, 8. MIFIP, 9. MiPrecious, 10. MPDS, 11. PAP, 12. Mission Syariah, 13. MDSA, 14. MiAction. Each product has a 'Klik Disini Untuk ISI FOLDER Lengkap' button linking to its main Google Drive folder.

Add CSS for accordion behavior: .accordion-header class toggles .active, .accordion-content uses max-height transition for smooth open/close. Add chevron icon that rotates on expand. Style consistent with existing .tools-section cards and design system (--jade, --bg-card, --border, --r-xl, --sp-* variables).
Add JavaScript for accordion toggle functionality. Click header to expand/collapse. Default state: all collapsed. Smooth animations via CSS transitions.

In /public/components/header.html, add a new link AFTER the existing 'Agen Tools' link in the mobile-nav. Add a new entry with a link icon and text 'Link Penting' pointing to /pages/linkpenting.html. Use style='color:var(--jade);font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px'. Use a link/bookmark icon SVG.
In /public/components/footer.html, add a 'Link Penting' link AFTER the existing 'Khusus Agen' link in the Info column. Use similar styling with an icon.

In /public/index.html, add a second link for 'Link Penting' inside the existing AGEN TOOLS LINK div (around line 573). Add it after the existing agen-tools link, same styling pattern (inline-flex, pill/border, icon). Use a link/bookmark icon instead of lock.
acceptance_criteria: File /public/pages/linkpenting.html exists and is valid HTML
Page shows password prompt on load, entering 'petrusjakub' reveals content
All 14 products from the source file are present as accordion cards with their respective sub-item links
Each product accordion card contains the correct Google Drive/YouTube links from the source
Quick-nav buttons at top allow jumping to each product section
Accordion expand/collapse works via JavaScript with smooth animation
Page uses the site design system (CSS variables, dark mode support, responsive)
Link to linkpenting.html appears in mobile menu in header.html after the Agen Tools link
Link to linkpenting.html appears in footer.html after the Khusus Agen link
Link to linkpenting.html appears in index.html in the AGEN TOOLS LINK section
verification: Grep for password 'petrusjakub' in the file
Grep for accordion class names in the file
Grep for 'linkpenting' in header.html, footer.html, and index.html
Verify all 14 product sections from source are present (grep for MIUHC, MDLA, MPS, MPPS, MCCP, MDWA, MSP, MIFIP, MiPrecious, MPDS, PAP, Mission, MDSA, MiAction)
findings: All 14 products extracted from source file and implemented as accordion cards. Source file contains Section I (Simple Produk Knowledge) with 12 distinct products plus MDSA and MiAction referenced. MiAction shares content with MDWA (same folder link). No build/test needed as this is a static HTML project.
